response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, AI tooling, and high-throughput microservices. However, his resume lacks demonstrated experience in building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, and telemetry infrastructure, which are the core focus areas for this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. While his general engineering fundamentals are excellent, the absence of domain-specific growth and experimentation expertise makes him a borderline candidate for an IC6 level in this highly specialized niche.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Strong track record of engineering excellence, demonstrated through testing framework development and organizing coding dojos.
concerns: Lacks demonstrable experience architecting enterprise-scale experimentation platforms or feature-flagging systems.
No explicit background in growth strategy, telemetry foundations, or experimental data analysis and statistics.
The leap to Principal (IC6) might be challenging without deep domain expertise in measurement and rollout-risk management.
